name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: PM-KISAN provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families in three equal installments.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year directly transferred to bank account
howToApply: Apply through nearest CSC center, agriculture department office, or assisted registration.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme that protects farmers from crop losses due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
locationNotes: Available in notified districts across India
benefits: Very low insurance premium with full crop loss protection
howToApply: Apply through your bank while taking crop loan or via agriculture office.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Provides short-term credit for farmers to purchase seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and equipment.
howToApply: Apply at any nationalized or cooperative bank.

name: MOVCD-NER Organic Farming Scheme
description: Supports organic farming in North Eastern states through organic inputs, certification, and training.
locationNotes: Only for North Eastern states of India
benefits: Free organic inputs, certification support, farmer training
howToApply: Apply through State Agriculture Department under cluster approach.

name: Micro Irrigation Subsidy Scheme
description: Provides subsidy for drip and sprinkler irrigation systems to save water and increase yield.
benefits: Up to 55% subsidy on irrigation equipment
howToApply: Apply through agriculture department irrigation scheme portal.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides farmers with detailed soil test reports and fertilizer recommendations.
benefits: Free soil test reports with crop-wise fertilizer guidance
howToApply: Apply through local agriculture office or soil testing labs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana
description: Improves irrigation facilities and water use efficiency for farms.
benefits: Irrigation infrastructure support and water conservation

name: National Food Security Mission
description: Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, and coarse cereals.
benefits: Seed subsidy, machinery support, training programs

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: Provides funding to states for agricultural infrastructure and farmer welfare.
benefits: Farm mechanization, cold storage, processing units

name: Pashu Kisan Credit Card
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Special credit card scheme for livestock and dairy farmers.
howToApply: Apply through cooperative banks and dairy unions.
